seoTitle: Mersen Circuit Protection Solutions | Semiconductor, EV, Industrial
seoDescription: Explore Mersen circuit protection solutions for semiconductor protection, electric vehicles, renewable energy, and industrial applications. Complete protection solutions.

faqs.question: What industries does Mersen serve with its protection solutions?
faqs.answer: Mersen provides electrical protection solutions across diverse industries: Electric Vehicles (battery protection, charging infrastructure), Renewable Energy (solar, wind, energy storage), Semiconductors (IGBT protection, power converters), Industrial (motor protection, power distribution), Data Centers (UPS, power distribution), Railways (traction systems), and Marine (shipboard systems). Each solution leverages Mersen's expertise in high-speed fuses, DC protection, and surge protection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Identify your industry and application requirements, then explore our industry-specific solutions.

faqs.question: How do I choose between high-speed fuses and standard fuses?
faqs.answer: Use high-speed fuses for semiconductor protection (IGBTs, diodes, thyristors) where fast opening (<1ms) and low I2t are critical. Use standard/industrial fuses for general circuit protection (motors, transformers, distribution) where cost-effectiveness and standard protection are sufficient. High-speed fuses are 3-5x more expensive but essential for protecting expensive semiconductors.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use high-speed for semiconductors. Use standard for general circuits.

solutions.name: Industrial Control Solution 1
solutions.description: Complete protection solution for power semiconductors including IGBTs, SiC MOSFETs, and diodes. Features Mersen high-speed fuses with ultra-low I2t values and fast opening times to protect expensive semiconductor devices from overcurrent damage.
features: Low I2t minimizes thermal stress on devices
Current limitation reduces peak fault current

coreAdvantages.title: Semiconductor-Safe Protection
coreAdvantages.description: Ultra-fast opening and low I2t prevent thermal damage to expensive IGBTs and SiC devices.

coreAdvantages.title: High Breaking Capacity
coreAdvantages.description: 200kA breaking capacity handles severe faults in high-power converters.

coreAdvantages.title: Wide Voltage Coverage
coreAdvantages.description: 500V to 1500V ratings cover all power electronics applications.

customerCases.challenge: The customer needed reliable IGBT protection for 200kW motor drives with 500V DC link voltage.
customerCases.solution: BeiLuo provided Mersen HS200-500 high-speed fuses with comprehensive I2t coordination analysis.
customerCases.results: The protection system has successfully cleared multiple fault conditions without IGBT damage. Production reliability improved significantly.
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.insight: Semiconductor protection requires careful I2t coordination. Always verify fuse clearing I2t is less than device withstand with 20% margin. The HS and PC series provide excellent protection for modern power electronics.
keyTakeaways: Use high-speed fuses for all semiconductor applications
Consider voltage transients in rating selection
faeInsights.content: [Data Pending] FAE insights to be added based on actual application experience with this solution.

faqs.question: How do I coordinate fuse I2t with IGBT withstand?
faqs.answer: Ensure fuse clearing I2t < 0.8 x IGBT withstand I2t. Check datasheets for values at same fault current and time. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Compare fuse and IGBT I2t with 20% safety margin.

solutions.title: Industrial Control Solution 1
solutions.longDescription:
The Industrial Control Solution 1 from mersen represents a comprehensive approach to addressing modern challenges in Industrial. This solution integrates advanced semiconductor technology with robust design methodologies to deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of mersen components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. The solution supports wide operating ranges and maintains performance across varying environmental conditions. Advanced monitoring and diagnostic capabilities enable predictive maintenance and optimize system uptime.

Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. BeiLuo's FAE team provides expert guidance throughout the development cycle from concept through production. Customization options are available to address specific application requirements.

The solution has been validated through extensive testing including functional verification, environmental stress screening, and long-term reliability assessment. Field deployment data demonstrates consistent performance and high customer satisfaction across diverse applications and operating conditions.

solutions.name: Automotive Electronics Solution 2
solutions.description: High-voltage DC protection solution for electric vehicles, energy storage, and solar applications. Features specialized DC arc quenching technology for safe interruption of high DC fault currents.

keyComponents.description: 1000V DC fuse for EV and storage

coreAdvantages.title: DC Arc Management
coreAdvantages.description: Specialized arc quenching for safe DC interruption at high voltages.

coreAdvantages.title: High Breaking Capacity
coreAdvantages.description: 100kA DC breaking capacity handles severe battery fault currents.

customerCases.challenge: Needed reliable DC protection for 800V battery system with 80kA fault current capability.
customerCases.solution: Mersen FD series DC fuses with 100kA breaking capacity.
customerCases.results: Protection system validated and in production.
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.insight: DC protection requires specialized fuses. Never use AC fuses on DC circuits - they can fail catastrophically. The FD series provides reliable DC arc interruption.
keyTakeaways: Use DC-rated fuses only for DC applications
Verify DC breaking capacity meets requirements
faeInsights.content: [Data Pending] FAE insights to be added based on actual application experience with this solution.

faqs.question: Why can't I use AC fuses for DC?
faqs.answer: DC arcs are harder to interrupt than AC. DC fuses have specialized arc quenching. AC fuses may fail catastrophically on DC. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.
faqs.decisionGuide: Always use DC-rated fuses for DC circuits.

solutions.name: Renewable Energy Protection Solution
solutions.description: Comprehensive circuit protection solution for solar PV and wind power applications. Features gPV series fuses specifically designed for photovoltaic systems with 1500VDC ratings and superior cycling capability for harsh outdoor environments.
features: UV resistant construction for outdoor use
High breaking capacity up to 50kA DC
Compact size for string combiner boxes

keyComponents.description: 30A 1500VDC gPV fuse for solar string protection
50A 1500VDC gPV fuse for larger solar strings

coreAdvantages.title: PV-Specific Design
coreAdvantages.description: gPV fuses are specifically designed for photovoltaic applications with enhanced thermal cycling and UV resistance.

coreAdvantages.title: High Voltage Capability
coreAdvantages.description: 1500VDC rating supports modern high-voltage PV systems, reducing current and improving efficiency.

coreAdvantages.title: Long Service Life
coreAdvantages.description: Superior cycling capability ensures reliable operation over 25+ year PV system lifetime.

customerCases.challenge: Needed reliable string protection for 1500VDC solar farm with 25-year design life in harsh desert environment.
customerCases.solution: Mersen gPV series fuses with 1500VDC rating and superior thermal cycling capability.
customerCases.results: Protection system installed across 500MW solar farm with zero failures over 3 years of operation.
customerCases.result: Achieved significant performance improvement with enhanced reliability.

faeInsights.insight: Solar applications require fuses specifically designed for PV. Standard DC fuses may not handle the daily thermal cycling and UV exposure. The gPV series is engineered for 25+ year service life in outdoor environments. Always verify the fuse is rated for the maximum system voltage including temperature coefficients - a 1500V system may see 1600V+ on cold days.
keyTakeaways: Use gPV-rated fuses for all PV applications
Verify 1500V rating for modern high-voltage systems
Consider thermal cycling in fuse selection
faeInsights.content: Based on years of experience supporting solar installations, the gPV series provides the specialized protection needed for photovoltaic systems. The thermal cycling capability is critical - standard fuses may fail prematurely due to daily temperature swings.

decisionFramework.title: Decision Framework
steps: Calculate maximum string voltage including temperature coefficient
Select fuse current rating based on string current
Verify gPV certification for PV applications

faqs.question: Why do PV applications need special fuses?
faqs.answer: Photovoltaic applications require specialized fuses due to unique operating conditions: 1) Daily thermal cycling from -20°C to +85°C causes expansion/contraction stress; 2) UV exposure degrades standard fuse materials over time; 3) Reverse current flow during shading requires bidirectional protection; 4) 25-year service life requirement exceeds standard fuse design life. gPV fuses address all these challenges with enhanced materials and construction.
faqs.decisionGuide: Always use gPV-certified fuses for solar applications to ensure long-term reliability.

solutions.title: Renewable Energy Protection Solution
solutions.longDescription:
The Renewable Energy Protection Solution from Mersen provides specialized circuit protection for solar photovoltaic and wind power applications. This solution leverages the gPV series fuses specifically engineered for the unique demands of renewable energy systems.

Solar PV systems operate in harsh outdoor environments with extreme temperature variations and continuous UV exposure. The gPV fuses feature UV-resistant construction and superior thermal cycling capability to ensure reliable protection over the 25+ year system lifetime. The 1500VDC rating supports modern high-voltage PV architectures, reducing current and improving overall system efficiency.

For wind power applications, the solution provides protection for power conversion systems including rectifiers, inverters, and DC links. The high breaking capacity handles fault currents from large turbine generators while the compact size fits space-constrained nacelle installations.

The solution includes comprehensive engineering support from BeiLuo's renewable energy FAE team, including string sizing calculations, fuse coordination studies, and installation guidance. All components carry global certifications (IEC, UL, CSA) for worldwide deployment.

Field-proven across utility-scale solar farms and commercial wind installations, this solution delivers the reliability and longevity required for renewable energy investments.
